theme_strategy.rationale: A restaurant ecosystem requires an appetizing, warm, and inviting aesthetic for consumer pages, fostering trust and appetite. Operational dashboards will use a dense, high-contrast variant of this palette to ensure legibility and functional efficiency without losing the brand's warmth.

operational_dashboards.grid_strategy: MODE B: Control Room Grid (dense, fully utilized cells)

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-primary_foreground hover:bg-primary_hover transition-colors rounded-full px-8 py-3 font-functional_heading font-medium
buttons.outline: border-2 border-primary text-primary hover:bg-primary/5 transition-colors rounded-full px-8 py-3 font-functional_heading font-medium
buttons.pos_action: bg-surface_subtle hover:bg-primary/10 text-heading rounded-lg px-4 py-3 font-medium border border-border

cards.menu_item: bg-surface_elevated rounded-3xl overflow-hidden shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-shadow
cards.kds_ticket: bg-white border-t-4 border-t-prep_warning rounded-lg p-4 shadow-sm

navigation.consumer_header: sticky top-0 z-50 backdrop-blur-xl bg-page_base/70 border-b border-border/50
navigation.admin_sidebar: fixed left-0 top-0 h-full w-64 bg-surface_elevated border-r border-border

forms.inputs: bg-surface_subtle border-none rounded-xl px-4 py-3 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-primary
forms.guideline: Use customized Shadcn UI forms. No native select or date inputs.

pages.name: Auth (Login / Register)
features: Split screen: Abstract warm texture left, clean form right

pages.name: Chef KDS (Kitchen Display)
features: Horizontal scrolling Kanban of order tickets

pages.name: Waiter Dashboard
features: Push notification styled alerts for 'Food Ready'

image_urls.description: Warm terracotta abstract texture for login and hero backgrounds
Chef cooking in kitchen, use for about or admin pages
Healthy salad bowl for menu items
Slice of cake for dessert menu

motion_and_interactions.hover_states: All buttons and cards must lift slightly (-translate-y-1) and increase shadow opacity.
motion_and_interactions.page_transitions: Framer motion fade and slight slide-up (y: 10 to 0).
motion_and_interactions.glassmorphism: Used strictly on sticky navigation and overlapping modal sheets (backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/70).

testing_attributes.guideline: All interactive elements MUST include data-testid. Format: kebab-case, role-based.

instructions_to_main_agent: Build the application as a React SPA with mock data simulating a full backend.
Ensure the router clearly separates consumer pages from operational dashboards (/app, /kds, /pos, /admin).
Install and use Playfair Display and Outfit fonts via Google Fonts.
Apply Shadcn UI components but override their default borders and radiuses to match this guideline's warm, organic (rounded-3xl for consumer, rounded-lg for admin) aesthetic.
Follow the EXACT color palette specified. Avoid pure black/white unless specified. Use the 'page_base' (#FAFAF8) for the main app background to give it a creamy, premium feel.
Implement data-testids on all buttons and actionable elements.
Do not use dummy image placeholders. Use only the exact image URLs provided in this file.
